message:
feat: Add isinstance type narrowing and return boxing for Two-Flow system

- Add flow-sensitive type narrowing in TypeInferrer (narrowTypeForIsinstance,
  restoreNarrowedType) for isinstance checks
- Add isinstance pattern detection in statements.zig (detectIsinstancePattern,
  pythonTypeToNative) to identify isinstance(var, Type) conditions
- Apply narrowing in if_stmt handling: narrow before if body, restore after
- Add current_function_returns_pyvalue flag to track PyValue return functions
- Set flag in emitInferredReturnType when return type is runtime.PyValue
- Reset flag after function body generation
- Add return boxing in genReturn: wrap return values with runtime.PyValue.from()
  when function returns PyValue (handles isinstance narrowing case)

This enables isinstance type narrowing optimization while ensuring type safety
at function boundaries through automatic boxing.
